prompt: Let's start Day 4 (Load Balancer). I'm at Phase 1.

assertions.name: uses-story-trigger
assertions.description: RPG version uses story trigger (traffic surge, 小杰's wrong fix). Main version introduces topic without story.

assertions.name: teaching-content-complete
assertions.description: Full teaching content present: LB concepts, chunk map, Feynman Gate

assertions.name: story-max-3-lines
assertions.description: RPG story elements stay within ~3 lines per step, not dominating

assertions.name: character-serves-learning
assertions.description: RPG characters (小球, 小杰) connect to teaching goals, not decorative

assertions.name: analogy-present
assertions.description: Uses a real-life analogy to introduce Load Balancer concept

assertions.name: engagement-quality
assertions.description: Overall engagement: does the output make you want to continue learning?
